description: Maps architectural node IDs (as used in MMD/SVG files) to the versions they are present in, when they were introduced, and any changes across versions. Used by the triple-view version selector in explorer.html.

WORLD.change_note: V2: environment is CausalGridWorld (causal attribution tracking) vs GridWorld in V1

E1.change_note: V2: receives post-commit outcome replays from LRN via HPC (separated from E2 planning path). V3: alpha_world fix (SD-008, must be >=0.9); receives z_self/z_world split outputs (SD-005)

E2.change_note: V2: pure f(z,a)->z' fast forward predictor; hippocampal planning and rollout separated into HPC (SD-001 fix). V3: operates exclusively on z_self (SD-005); rollout_horizon architecture formalized

HPC.change_note: V2 new: HippocampalSystems (rollout and provenance) separated from E2 — resolves SD-001 E2/hippocampal conflation. V3: SD-004 action objects as map backbone; longer planning horizons

CP.change_note: V2: control plane precision updates (MECH-059) operate on separate timescale from E3 policy decisions. V3: SD-006 async multi-rate loop execution; ARC-023 characteristic thalamic heartbeat rates

E3.change_note: V2: receives rollout candidates from HPC (separated from E2); commitment boundary validated (MECH-061). V3: z_world as primary domain (SD-005); SD-003 counterfactual attribution; ARC-016 dynamic precision; hypothesis tag (MECH-094)

LRN.change_note: V2: post-commit learning now feeds outcome traces to HPC for replay (MECH-061 commitment boundary). V3: ARC-021 three-loop separation — sensory, motor-sensory, and harm/goal error channels are incommensurable (MECH-069)

Z_SELF.change_note: V3 new: z_self — proprioceptive/motor-sensory latent (E2 domain). SD-005 split of z_gamma. Separates agent's causal footprint from world-directed residue.

Z_WORLD.change_note: V3 new: z_world — world-directed causal/residue latent (E3/HPC domain). SD-005 split of z_gamma. alpha_world must be >=0.9 (SD-008/MECH-100). Supports SD-003 counterfactual attribution.
